title: Bold Easy Coloring Animals
author: Deokgu Studio
description:
Bold lines. Big shapes. Adorable animals. This easy coloring book is made for the people most coloring books forget - seniors, those with low vision, beginners, and anyone who just wants to color without squinting.

Who it's for:
- Older adults and seniors looking for relaxing, low-stress activities
- People with macular degeneration, cataracts, or general low vision
- Beginners and reluctant colorers
- Memory care and assisted-living activity coordinators

What's inside:
- 50+ original animal designs: cats, dogs, owls, elephants, bunnies, foxes, sea creatures, and more
- Thick, bold outlines that stay visible even with tired eyes
- Wide-open spaces - no tiny details, no frustration
- One image per page (back side blank) so markers don't bleed through and ruin the next page
- Large 8.5 x 11 inch format - the canvas your hands deserve

Perfect for therapy sessions, rainy afternoons, hospital stays, group activities at senior centers, or quiet mornings with a cup of tea. Works with crayons, markers, colored pencils, and gel pens.

Coloring is proven to lower stress, sharpen focus, and bring small daily joy. This book makes that joy accessible.

Add to cart and gift one to yourself, a parent, or a friend who could use a calmer hour.
